About the Villa

A Hilltop Villa
Built for Real Rest

Aara Villa sits on a quiet hilltop near Kalyan, surrounded by trees and open sky. It's a 3BHK space with a private pool, a big kitchen, and enough room for your whole group to spread out and breathe.

"Woke up to fog on the hills and came back home actually feeling rested."

Whether it's a family trip, a friends getaway, or just a long-overdue break — Aara is the kind of place you keep coming back to.

Don't Take Our Word for It

How to Get Here

Close to Kalyan,
Away from Everything Else

Near Kalyan, Maharashtra

Located on a scenic hilltop just outside Kalyan, easily accessible from Mumbai and Pune.

~60 mins from Mumbai

Smooth highway drive from Mumbai makes this the perfect quick weekend escape.

Cab & Self-Drive Friendly

Well-connected roads, private parking available on premises.
